batch.title: Batch Processing
batch.subtitle: Generate multiple templates automatically using an Excel spreadsheet. Upload the file with the data and select the desired template models.
batch.uploadDesc: Upload an .xlsx or .xls file containing the data to generate the templates (maximum 10MB).
batch.dragDrop: Drag and drop your Excel file here.
batch.templateModelsDesc: Select the templates that will be used as models for generating the documents.
batch.fileTooLargeDesc: The file must be a maximum of 10MB.
batch.incompleteDataDesc: Select an Excel file and at least one template.
batch.processingStartedDesc: The templates are being generated. The download will begin soon.
batch.processingErrorDesc: The file could not be processed. Please try again.
batch.step1: Upload an Excel spreadsheet with the template data
batch.step2: Select the template models to be used
batch.step3: The system will generate a template for each row of the spreadsheet using each selected model
batch.step4: All templates will be compressed into a ZIP file for download

api.interactiveGeneratorDesc: Don't want to write JSON? Use the visual interface to generate documents directly from your browser.

landing.heroSubtitle: Create reusable templates with dynamic fields. Preview documents live as you type, then generate professional PDFs — instantly, in bulk, or via API.
landing.featureBadge: Live preview · API keys · Email delivery · Batch
landing.featuresSubtitle: A complete platform for document automation — from template creation to live preview, bulk generation, and email delivery.
landing.feat1Desc: Build rich document templates with a WYSIWYG editor. Add sections, reorder them with drag-and-drop, and reuse sections across multiple templates.
landing.feat2Desc: Define typed fields (text, number, date, select, email, long text) and embed them as placeholders. Configure and fill them all from the Generate page.
landing.feat3Desc: Queue documents for async PDF generation. Get notified when they're ready and download them directly from the app — no waiting around.
landing.feat4Desc: Upload an Excel spreadsheet and generate one PDF per row across any number of templates — in a single operation.
landing.feat5Desc: Integrate document generation into your own workflows via a clean REST API. Full documentation is built into the app.
landing.feat6Desc: The interface is available in English, Finnish and Swedish. Language preference is saved automatically.
landing.feat7Desc: See the document update in real time as you fill in each field. Unfilled placeholders are highlighted so nothing gets missed before generating.
landing.feat8Desc: Generate and manage API keys for programmatic document generation. Integrate DDoc into any workflow without session-based authentication.
landing.feat9Desc: Send generated PDFs directly from the app to any email address. Powered by Kafka for reliable async delivery.
landing.howSubtitle: From template to finished document in three simple steps.
landing.step1Desc: Create a template, add sections with your HTML content, and insert dynamic placeholders like #CLIENT_NAME# or #CONTRACT_DATE#.
landing.step2Desc: Open the Generate page and go to the Fields tab. Register your tags with types and contexts — they instantly appear as typed form fields with a live preview alongside.
landing.step3Desc: Fill in the field values, preview the result live, then click Generate. Documents are queued and processed asynchronously — download them or send directly via email.
landing.ctaBannerSubtitle: Create your account and start generating professional PDFs today.
landing.footerLinks: Sign In · Sign Up · API Docs
